_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: Windrose Dedicated Server
author: help@hypeserv.com
description: Windrose dedicated server running under Wine on Debian Bookworm.

variables.name: Update On Start
variables.description: Download and validate server files on every startup. Set to false to skip.

variables.name: Invite Code
variables.description: Invite code players use to join. Min 6 characters, 0-9 a-z A-Z, case sensitive.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Display name shown in the server browser.

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: Leave empty for a public server.

variables.name: P2P Proxy Address
variables.description: IP address the P2P proxy binds to. Use 127.0.0.1 for normal Docker networking; use the host LAN IP when players are on the same network.

variables.name: Generate Settings
variables.description: Set to false to skip config generation and use whatever is already in ServerDescription.json.

variables.name: Steam Username
variables.description: Optional Steam username for DepotDownloader. Not required — Windrose is free-to-play.
